sources.expression: $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT id FROM $table_name WHERE ip_address = %s AND login_name = %s AND operation = %d AND time BETWEEN %s - INTERVAL %d SECOND AND %s - INTERVAL %d SECOND; ", $ip_address, $user, $operation, $now, $less_sec, $now, $after_sec ) )
$wpdb->get_var( "SELECT id FROM $table_name ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 9999,1;", 0, 0 )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT status, count, last_login_time from $table_name WHERE ip_address = %s", $ip_address ) )
